message.content:
The user wants me to create webpage 3 (page-3.html) and link it back to page 2, while preserving the existing links between page 1 and page 2. Looking at the existing files: - site/index.html - has nav with links to Home and Page 2, plus a "Back to home" link in main - site/page-2.html - has nav with links to Home and Page 2, plus a "Back to home" link in main I need to: 1. Create site/page-3.html with navigation links to Home, Page 2, and Page 3 2. Update site/page-2.html to include a link to page-3.html in the nav 3. Possibly update site/index.html to include a link to page-3.html in the nav The validators: - page-3-links-page-2: failure_class=link_integrity - page 3 must link to page 2 - previous-links-preserved: failure_class=link_integrity - the existing links between page 1 and page 2 must still work So I need to: 1. Create page-3.html with nav links to index.html, page-2.html, and page-3.html, and content about page 3 2. Update page-2.html to add a link to page-3.html in the nav 3. Update index.html to add a link to page-3.html in the nav Let me create the JSON response. { "files": [ { "path": "site/index.html", "content": " My Website
Home Page 2 Page 3

Welcome

This is the main content of the page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": " Page 2
Home Page 2 Page 3

Page 2

This is the second page of the website.

Back to home

" }, { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": " Page 3
Home Page 2 Page 3

Page 3

This is the third page of the website.

Back to page 2

" } ], "notes": "Created page-3.html linking to page 2, updated page-2.html and index.html nav to include Page 3 link." }
